Environmental Protection.summary: Thune has consistently opposed major federal climate regulations and supported fossil fuel development.
voted_for: Resolution to overturn EPA Clean Power Plan (Senate vote, 2015)
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act containing climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Thune has opposed federal marijuana legalization efforts.
voted_against: MORE Act - federal marijuana decriminalization (procedural opposition, 2022)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Thune has supported tax cuts and opposed increased taxation on wealthy individuals and corporations.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate vote, December 2017)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Thune has a consistent anti-abortion voting record and supports restrictions on reproductive rights.
voted_for: Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act (Senate vote, 2018)
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Rounds has opposed federal climate regulations and supported energy independence through fossil fuels.
voted_against: Inflation Reduction Act climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Rounds has consistently voted against abortion access legislation.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Rounds supported the 2017 tax cuts and has opposed tax increases on corporations and high earners.
voted_for: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (Senate vote, December 2017)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Rounds voted for the Respect for Marriage Act but has opposed other LGBTQ+ protections.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Johnson has opposed major climate legislation while supporting agricultural conservation programs.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Johnson has voted for abortion restrictions and against federal protections for abortion access.
voted_against: Women's Health Protection Act (House vote, September 2021)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Johnson has opposed federal marijuana legalization legislation.
voted_against: MORE Act - marijuana decriminalization (House vote, April 2022)

Small Business Funding.summary: Johnson has supported small business assistance programs and PPP funding.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Aylward has supported abortion restrictions in the South Dakota Legislature.
voted_for: HB 1217 - transgender athlete ban (South Dakota House, 2021)

Public School Funding.summary: Novstrup has supported education funding increases in the state legislature.
voted_for: Teacher pay increase legislation (South Dakota House, 2016)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Beal has supported legislation limiting transgender rights in South Dakota.
voted_for: SB 46 - transgender sports ban (South Dakota Senate, 2022)
